getBlobSASUri.summary: Get blob SAS URI using path

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: The name for the storage container and optional folder.

parameters.name: blobName
parameters.description: The name for the blob and optional folder.

parameters.name: groupPolicyIdentifier
parameters.description: The string that identifies a stored access policy. Group policy parameters, such as start time and expiry time, have precedence over input parameters in actions.

parameters.name: permissions
parameters.description: The access permissions for the SAS URI.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: The date and time when the SAS becomes valid, for example, '2017-11-01T15:30:00+00.00'.Default=now().

parameters.name: expiryTime
parameters.description: The date and time when the SAS is no longer valid, for example, '2017-11-01T15:30:00+00.00'.Default=now() + 24h.

parameters.name: sharedAccessProtocol
parameters.description: The allowed protocols, either HTTPS only or HTTP and HTTPS. Leave empty if you don't want to restrict traffic based on protocol.

parameters.name: ipAddressRange
parameters.description: The allowed IP address or address range. Leave empty if you don't to restrict traffic based on IP address.

parameters.name: deploymentId
parameters.description: The deployment or model name.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The array input to convert to embeddings.

parameters.name: deploymentId
parameters.description: The deployment or model name.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The single text to convert to an embedding.

parameters.name: deploymentId
parameters.description: The deployment or model name.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: A value that controls the apparent creativity of generated completions. Higher values make output more random, while lower values make results more focused and deterministic.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: The completion messages.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: A value that controls the apparent creativity of generated completions and an alternative to 'Temperature'. Recommendation: Change either this value or 'Temperature', but not both.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate for a chat completion.

parameters.name: presence_penalty
parameters.description: A value that influences the probability of generated tokens appearing, based on their existence in generated text. Positive values penalize new tokens, based on their frequency in the text so far and decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.

parameters.name: frequency_penalty
parameters.description: A value that affects the probability of generated tokens appearing, based on their cumulative frequency. Positive values penalize new tokens, based on their frequency in the text so far and decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.

parameters.description: Lists releases to use for specific IDoc types when different from received 'DOCREL' field or default release setting. Syntax: DOCTYPE1=DOCREL1;DOCTYPE2=DOCREL2; Overrides DOCREL.

parameters.description: Marks a program registration to gateway without work process.

parameters.description: When this value is 'True', overwrite the file, if already existing.

parameters.name: fileOrFolderPath
parameters.description: The file or folder path, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The path to the folder that's to be listed relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: filesOnly
parameters.description: When this parameter is set to 'True', only the files in the specified folder are listed. Subfolders are excluded.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The file path with the file extension if any, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: skipDelete
parameters.description: If file doesn't exist, deletion is skipped, and this action won't fail.

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The path for the folder to create. This path must be relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The file path with the file extension if any, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: newFileName
parameters.description: The new name for the file. This value must be only the name, not the path.

parameters.name: fetchMetadata
parameters.description: When this value is 'True', return the metadata of the renamed file in this action's output.

parameters.name: sourceFilePath
parameters.description: The file path for the file to copy, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: destinationFilePath
parameters.description: The destination file path, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: overWriteFileIfExists
parameters.description: If the destination file exists, overwrite that file.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The file path with the file extension if any, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: inferContentType
parameters.description: Infer content-type based on extension

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The relative path to the archive file. The file name must have a .zip extension.

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The folder path where to extract the files, relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: overwriteExistingFilesBehaviour
parameters.description: The input determines the behaviour  when dealing with files having same path as the archive already exist on the file server.

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The folder path relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: recursiveDelete
parameters.description: This action will delete all files and subfolders in the given folder when this input is set to 'True'. Otherwise if the folder is non-empty, the action will fail.

whenFilesAreAddedOrModified.summary: When files are added or updated

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The folder path relative to the root directory.

parameters.name: includeFileContent
parameters.description: If this value is 'True', get the file content along with the file name and properties.

parameters.name: maxFileCount
parameters.description: The maximum number of files to include in a single trigger run. If you don't want this limit, ignore this parameter.

parameters.name: oldFilesCutoffTimestamp
parameters.description: Ignore files that are older than the specified cutoff timestamp. Use the format 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS'. To disable this option, ignore this parameter.

parameters.name: ignoreFileExtensions
parameters.description: Ignore files that have any of the specified file name extensions. Don't prefix extensions with the period ('.') separator.
